title: Silan: Monster Girl Master!
description:
“Silan: Monster Girl Master” is a game developed entirely by myself over the course of two years. 
It is a Monster Girl Capture & Collection RPG that combines Soulslike exploration with Rance X-inspired combat.

✦ Rance X × Soulslike-Style CombatThe combat system is heavily inspired by the masterpiece “Rance X”, 
while also incorporating Soulslike elements such as:

• Poise system

• Execution mechanics

• And a new ultimate skill charge system

✦ Capture & Raise Over 60 Monster GirlsThe game features more than 60 unique monster girls. 
Each monster girl has:

• 3 exclusive skills

• Different combat roles and growth paths

• Capture and collection mechanics using the “Monster Ring”

• Enhancement and progression through “Magic Stones”

✦ Lightly Guided ExplorationThe game features a Soulslike-inspired “light guidance” exploration design.

You can obtain subtle hints through “Advice” messages scattered throughout the world, 
and freely explore forests, oceans, deserts, snowy mountains, volcanoes, graveyards, and many other regions.

Each area is inhabited by its own unique monster girls.

✦ DEMO Available NowA playable DEMO is currently available — feel free to give it a try ˶╹ꇴ╹˶

The full release is planned for July~~
description_short: Silan: Monster Girl Master is a soulslike-inspired monster girl collection RPG developed solo over 2 years. Recruit and strengthen 60+ monster girls with unique skills and attributes, explore forests, deserts, volcanoes, and more, and experience Rance X-inspired combat. DEMO available now!
